how_it_works.title: Specify Venue Type
how_it_works.description: Restaurant, cafe, cafeteria, or food court — AI will adapt the template.

how_it_works.title: Start Generation
how_it_works.description: AI will create the website with menu, structure, and design in seconds.

how_it_works.title: Customize and Launch
how_it_works.description: Add real dishes, prices, and publish — website is ready to operate.

faq.question: What types of catering establishments are supported?
faq.answer: The builder is suitable for restaurants, cafes, bars, cafeterias, coffee shops, food courts, and fast food establishments.

faq.question: Can I add online ordering and delivery?
faq.answer: Yes, you can set up order receiving with delivery or pickup on your website.

faq.question: How do I update menus and prices?
faq.answer: All changes are made through the visual editor — without a programmer, instantly.

faq.question: Is it suitable for a chain of venues?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create a separate website for each location or a unified site with branches.

faq.question: Will the website be visible in search engines?
faq.answer: Yes, SEO optimization is included by default — venue is found by city and cuisine type.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a catering website?
faq.answer: Start for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain and advanced features.

cta_mid_subtitle: AI will generate the menu, design, and all needed sections — in 5 minutes.
cta_final_subtitle: Attract guests from the internet — create a website in 5 minutes without programmers.
